name: Caramel Cream
servings: serves 8 3 organic egg yolks pinch of salt 200 g caster sugar 500 ml cream 1 teaspoon water
method: Serves 8 3 organic egg yolks pinch of salt 200 g caster sugar 500 ml cream 1 teaspoon water
In a mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks, salt and 2 tablespoons of the sugar until light and fluffy. Add the cream and beat for a further few minutes.
Heat the cream and egg mixture in a saucepan on low heat for just a few minutes.
Put the remaining sugar and the water in a saucepan over low heat and let it caramelise. Make sure the sugar does not burn.
Pour the cream into 8 small ramekins and refrigerate. Serve with whipped cream and biscuits on the side.
